embeds.title: Executive
embeds.description: You are part of the **core leadership team** overseeing all departments. You work closely with Head Executives to keep the server running smoothly, support Administrators, and handle escalated cases.

fields.name: 📋 Core Responsibilities
fields.value:
• Oversee the Administrator team day-to-day
• Review escalated moderation cases from Head Admins
• Assist the Head Executive with server-wide projects
• Participate in policy and rule discussions
• Monitor department health and staff activity
• Support Administrators with difficult judgment calls
• Provide feedback on server changes to Head Executive

fields.name: 🔑 Admin Panel Access
fields.value:
Executives have access to the TSHE website admin panel for reviewing site content and assisting leadership with updates when directed.

**URL:** https://tshe.noxxbot.com/admin
**Credentials:** Provided by Head Executive or above — keep confidential.

fields.name: ⚡ Authority Overview
fields.value:
• Admin-level permissions across all server channels
• Can issue temp bans up to 14 days independently
• Can approve Head Admin decisions on bans up to 30 days
• Can manage Administrators and Moderators
• Permanent bans require Head Executive sign-off
• Access to all moderation logs and staff channels

fields.name: 📤 Handle Directly
fields.value:
• Temp bans up to 14 days
• Ticket resolutions referred from Administrators
• Moderator performance concerns
• Member appeals for bans up to 14 days
• Channel conflicts and inter-member disputes

fields.name: 🚨 Escalate to Head Executive
fields.value:
• Permanent ban decisions
• Appeals from members banned 30+ days
• Staff misconduct at Administrator level
• Decisions requiring server-wide policy change
• Any unresolved inter-staff conflict after 3 attempts

fields.name: 📞 Escalation Chain
fields.value:
**Receives from:** Head Admins, Administrators
**Escalates to:** Head Executive → Co-Owner

fields.name: 🌐 Key Links
fields.value:
🔗 [Admin Panel](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/admin) — Site management
📜 [Rules Page](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/rules) — Community rules

⚖️ [Appeal System](https://appeal.gg/s/1466990155020898413) — Ban appeals
⚠️ [Punishment Guide](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/punish) — Tier reference
